data.title: Droperidol Versus Metoclopramide + Diphenhydramine for the Treatment of Primary Headaches in the Emergency Department: A Prospective Randomized, Double-blinded Trial.
data.brief_summary: The purpose of this study is to determine if droperidol is equally as effective as metoclopramide for treatment of primary headaches in the Emergency Department.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* 18 years old to 65 years old, diagnosis of primary headache

Exclusion Criteria:

* Allergy to study medications, pregnant, breast-feeding, prisoners, non-english speaking, not eligible to receive droperidol based on ED protocol (see below), patients in whom head trauma, infec
endpoints: Pain Scale (Numerical Rating Scale for Pain)
